content_body: We had such a wonderful and fun time! There were 7 of us and we went down the river on our own tubes after we parked our car down the road. We should have parked it at Horseshoe Bend park but we ended up parking it at the Tubing place called Rolling Thunder so instead of our tubing adventure only taking 50 minutes it took 4 hours! The good thing was we had a cooler full of beer and lots of fun making that trip. So just be aware if you get on the river at 12:30 it will take until 3:00pm to get to Horseshoe Bend Park. We all have never laughed so much. Awesome weather while we were here but the best weather the day we left.
title: Wonderful and Fun Time!
